heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to distribution of funds to members of the Shoshone Tribe of the Wind River Reservation, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–206, § 885 Stat. 739Dec. 18, 1971
